title: Supporting data for GP_2021_3
author: Gennady Gorin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This package contains raw and processed datasets used to support the conclusions of "Length Biases in Single-Cell RNA Sequencing of pre-mRNA" by Gennady Gorin and Lior Pachter. 

 GP_2021_3_raw_data.tar.gz: raw  loom  files. 

 GP_2021_3_fits.tar.gz: fits generated with  Monod . 

 GP_2021_3-zenodo.zip: copy of the GitHub repository (as of Dec 1, 2022) with all analysis scripts and notebooks.
steps_raw:
